/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -O3 -march=native -flto CMakeFiles/snes_emulator.dir/src/components/bus.cpp.o CMakeFiles/snes_emulator.dir/src/components/cartridge.cpp.o CMakeFiles/snes_emulator.dir/src/components/dma_controller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/snes_emulator.dir/src/components/opcode_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/snes_emulator.dir/src/components/ppu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/snes_emulator.dir/src/components/ricoh_5a22.cpp.o CMakeFiles/snes_emulator.dir/src/components/snes.cpp.o CMakeFiles/snes_emulator.dir/src/components/spc_700.cpp.o CMakeFiles/snes_emulator.dir/src/misc/common.cpp.o CMakeFiles/snes_emulator.dir/src/misc/utility.cpp.o CMakeFiles/snes_emulator.dir/src/cpu_operations/ricoh_5a22_operations.cpp.o CMakeFiles/snes_emulator.dir/src/cpu_operations/spc_700_operations.cpp.o CMakeFiles/snes_emulator.dir/src/mappers/mapper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/snes_emulator.dir/src/testing/test_harness.cpp.o CMakeFiles/snes_emulator.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o snes_emulator  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib/libSDL3.so.0.5.0
